race.comment: This is not a vintage renewal of the Tatts Tiara which gives TUILERIES (4) a great chance to win at the elite level. Put aside and kept fresh for this after a barnstorming win in the Group 3 Dark Jewel over this distance at Scone seven weeks ago. Can travel closer from a much better draw today. Clearly the one to beat. The only G1 winner in the field is MANAAL (3) who returned with a handy third in the Gr 2 Moreton Cup over 1200m here three weeks ago. Boasts three wins from five when second-up and 1400m is her pet trip. Has the perfect profile. WITHIN THE LAW (17) started favourite but was no match for Skyhook in the Gunsynd over the mile here recently. Worth another chance back to this trip with the blinkers going on. ABOUNDING (2) defeated the boys over 1350m at Doomben two back then was outclassed in the Stradbroke. Each-way claims at big odds. SPLASH BACK (1) hasn't been disgraced against the elite sprinters at her last two. Nicely placed at WFA.
